title: Mol* Linker Studio
content:
“Good software architecture is like a well-built foundation. It requires patience, precision, and a deep understanding of the load it will bear. This text is justified to create clean, mathematical edges, while the entire block sits perfectly in the center of the screen.”
This is the place where you are going to control the visual aspects of the viewport and work with templates .
Some content for the aside block.
We can even make the aside block aside-like with this little CSS.
This marked text’s foreground is red.
Global Scene Settings# Configure the background and camera perspective.
Global Target Configurations# Define the baseline visual representation for standard molecular classes.
